page: Microsoft Azure D96ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Ddsv7 server family. It is powered by an Intel processor with x86_64 architecture, offering 96 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs) managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance features 384.0 GB of system memory, which translates to a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU.

This server type includes 5669 GB of local storage and is premium storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk configurations. It does not feature any integrated graphics processing units (GPUs) and includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its high core count and substantial local storage capacity, the D96ds_v7 offers resource density suitable for large-scale enterprise workloads. The qualitative cost efficiency of this hardware profile is aligned with high-density general-purpose computing and database hosting. Appropriate workloads include relational databases, enterprise applications, data analytics, and web serving environments requiring significant local temporary storage and dedicated CPU resources.
description: Microsoft Azure D96ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Ddsv7 family, built on x86_64 architecture and powered by an Intel processor. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs managed by Microsoft Hyper-V, paired with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance is equipped with 5669 GB of local storage and supports premium storage options, though it lacks dedicated GPU hardware and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This configuration provides high resource density and compute capacity, making it suitable for demanding enterprise workloads. The server is well-suited for relational databases, large-scale web serving, data processing, and application hosting that benefit from substantial local storage and dedicated CPU allocation.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D96ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 5669 GB of local storage, optimized for database and enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density general-purpose virtual machine featuring ninety-six dedicated cores, balanced memory, and extensive local storage for enterprise workloads.
